recentArticles.title: Review: Dancing around controversy, the empathetic 'Michael' bows out before getting dark - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: Jaafar Jackson in the movie “Michael.”. (Meanwhile, there’s no Janet, not even onscreen in the background or mentioned at all.) The Jacksons’ biological and, presumably, financial ties to the project would raise a World Cup stadium of red flags even without Jaafar Jackson, Michael’s nephew, playing the lead. But suffocating nepotism might be the only way for now to capture someone as singularly strange as Jackson — if Jaafar delivered a line reading that wasn’t note perfect, it’s likely that someone in his clan would pipe up and say so. Jackson’s music videos — “short films,” he preferred to call them — did that too, in abbreviation. After adult Michael is ordered to be the central cog in the Jacksons’ post-”Thriller” Victory tour, the film cuts to him on the couch watching his idol Charlie Chaplin work the assembly line in “Modern Times.” Alongside that, we catch glimpses of the megastar’s effect on his siblings, like concert scenes where the spotlight is only on him, or in Tito’s choice to wear a bedazzled hat with his name in all-caps.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇影評探討了由麥可傑克森姪子賈法傑克森主演的電影《麥可》，分析其如何描繪麥可傑克森的生平與影響，並提及家族參與的爭議。

recentArticles.title: Yung Gravy Signs With BMG for New Album - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Yung Gravy Signs With BMG for New Album. ### Trending on Billboard. Yung Gravy has signed a global recording agreement with BMG for his next studio album, the company shared with *Billboard*. ### How Primary Wave Proved Everything Old Is New Again With Yung Gravy’s Radio Hit. “It’s a glorious honor to be a part of my new family at BMG,” Yung Gravy said in a statement. The deal marks Gravy’s first new label in nearly a decade after first signing with Republic in 2017. **Dan Gill**, BMG’s executive vp of recorded music, said in a statement: “Yung Gravy has carved out a lane entirely his own, combining infectious records with a highly original artistic voice to create something that truly connects with fans. We’re excited to welcome him to BMG and support what comes next!”. ### Yung Gravy Signs With BMG for New Album. ### Billboard’s Music Industry Events Calendar.

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Biopic Cast Looks Shockingly Like The Real People They Play — See Side-By-Side Photos - HuffPost
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Biopic Cast Looks Shockingly Like The Real People They Play. ## The highly-anticipated "Michael" film, about the life and early career of Michael Jackson, hits theaters this weekend — and talk about what the film gets right and wrong has already reached a fever pitch. ## MJ is played by his nephew, Jaafar Jackson, and there are moments in the film when it's truly hard to tell them apart. ## With so much buzz circling Michael, let's take a look at some side-by-side comparisons of the actors and the real people they're portraying in the film. ## First up, there's Jaafar Jackson as Michael. Jaafar is the son of Jermaine Jackson, and makes a real splash of a debut in Michael. Universal Pictures | Michael Ochs Archives / Getty Images. From left to right: Rhyan Hill as Tito Jackson, Tre' Horton as Marlon Jackson, Jaafar as Michael, Joseph David-Jones as Jackie Jackson, and Jamal Henderson as Jermaine Jackson.

recentArticles.title: Kat Graham Opens Up About Being Cut from Michael Movie After Filming as Diana Ross - People.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Kat Graham Opens Up About Being Cut from *Michael* Movie After Filming as Diana Ross. Kat Graham is addressing why she does not appear in the new Michael Jackson biopic, more than two years after reports surfaced that she would portray Diana Ross in the movie. *Variety* confirmed in 2024 that Graham, 36, would portray legendary Supremes lead singer Ross, now 82, in *Michael,* which stars the late pop star's nephew Jaafar Jackson in the lead role. *Michael* Reviews Praise Jaafar Jackson's Performance as 'Perfection,' Call Movie 'By-the-Musical-Numbers Biopic'. recentArticles.title: The Deals: Supertramp Bassist Dougie Thomson Sells Rights to MusicBird; Futures Raises $6M - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Indie label collective **Futures Music Group**, founded by co-CEOs **Derek Davies** and **Dave Wallace**, raised $6 million from investors across the U.S. and U.K. The financing will allow the company to continue investing in infrastructure, artist development, operations and in-house technology development, according to a press release. Critically, this investment also allows the team at Futures to begin building out the next phase of the company, which includes expanding into the catalog space and development of our own internal technologies to help artists maximize value and fan experience across their releases,” added Wallace. Being listed once on Bandsintown automatically reaches core audiences everywhere and now powering concert listings on Amazon Music will extend artists’ reach to even more fans worldwide.”. “We are thrilled to be partnering with AKANDO Music for radio promotion and to begin with Chris Young’s latest single,” said Black River’s national director of promotion and artist relations, **Kellie LaJack**.

recentArticles.title: Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed - capradio.org
recentArticles.snippet: # Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed. Jay (not pictured) found himself alone and hopeless in a jail cell when a fellow inmate's unexpected words of comfort changed his life. And so I started making poor decisions," Jay said. Jay made a plan to end his life. "I wish I could tell you that I remember the [exact] words that he said to me, but what I remember is that his words landed with me, and instead of wanting my life to be over, suddenly I saw hope," Jay said. The interaction happened nearly ten years ago, but it was a pivotal moment in Jay's life, and one he thinks about all the time. Jay says that he wishes he could meet that man again and express his appreciation. To share the story of your unsung hero with the Hidden Brain team, record a voice memo on your phone and send it to myunsunghero@hiddenbrain.org.*.

recentArticles.title: Teddy Swims Talks Coachella, White Claw Collab And Friends Who Matter - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: He brought out Joe Jonas for a duet on the Jonas Brothers’ 2007 single “When You Look Me in the Eyes.” He welcomed Vanessa Carlton to the stage to sing — and accompany him on piano for — her 2002 smash “A Thousand Miles.” And there was legendary Van Halen frontman David Lee Roth, striding out to deliver their ’80s classic “Jump.” By Weekend 2, Roth was back for more and, in a full-circle gesture, Swims returned the favor on the final day of Coachella by popping on stage to perform “Lose Control” alongside fellow soul singer and past collaborator Givēon. “I love that White Claw also has this burden for real connection, bringing people together and it feels like we’re so aligned on just how do we keep things intimate and loving, caring about one another and being real connective,” Swims, whose favorite White Claw flavor is Ruby Grapefruit, says of the partnership.
recentArticles.summary: Teddy Swims Talks Coachella, White Claw Collab And Friends Who Matter - Forbes

recentArticles.title: Lil Tjay on Offset, Justin Bieber, and Keeping His Foot on the Gas - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Two weeks ago, he walked out of Broward County Jail in Hollywood, Florida — arrested the night before on disorderly conduct charges in connection with the shooting of Offset outside the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino — and gave reporters an interview that lit up every music blog within the hour. What I can say is the album will really hit home for my fans.”. “My week’s been active,” he says. “The main thing — it’s completely me,” he says. The lead single “Life On Edge,” out today, sounds like what that independence feels like from the inside — stripped back, a little isolated, pressure coiled underneath calm production. “It feels unrealistic sometimes,” he says. “I fell short transitioning off the label and haven’t dropped an album since,” he says. “Where I’m from it wasn’t cool to be a Bieber fan, but I always rocked with him,” he says. “Stay on your own mission,” he says.

recentArticles.title: 'Michael' drama: Which Jacksons said 'no thanks' and why the film cut the sexual abuse claims - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: Tap to enable a layout that focuses on the article. # ‘Michael’ drama: Which Jacksons said ‘no thanks’ and why the film cut the sexual abuse claims. * Click here to listen to this article. Michael Jackson’s famous clan stepped out to celebrate the premiere of the new “Michael” biopic, but some of the Jacksons snubbed the event and have opposed the film. Marlon Jackson said, “Watching the movie, sometimes we think we’re watching Michael up there, that’s how good he is.”. But not all of the Jacksons were up for celebrating the film. Although both of Michael Jackson’s sons, Prince and Bigi, have supported events for the film (Prince attended Monday’s premiere, and Bigi attended a Berlin premiere last week), and Prince served as an executive producer and was regularly on set, Paris Jackson has been vocal about her lack of involvement. ### MrBeast company sued over claims of sexual harassment, firing a new mom.

recentArticles.title: Spinelli Kilcollin Draws Jennie, Lizzo, Katseye and Kaytranada to L.A. Flagship Preview - WWD
recentArticles.snippet: # Spinelli Kilcollin Draws Jennie, Lizzo, Katseye and Kaytranada to L.A. Flagship Preview. Spinelli Kilcollin, the Los Angeles-based fine jewelry brand known for its interconnected rings and architectural approach to design, offered a preview of its next chapter on Wednesday night. Founders Yves Spinelli and Dwyer Kilcollin hosted an after-hours gathering in a former gallery space soon to become the label’s 5,000-square-foot flagship at 747 North Western Avenue, cohosted with DJs and Simihaze Beauty founders, twins Simi and Haze Khadra. Spinelli Kilcollin has expanded in recent years from a design-focused jewelry studio into a broader cultural brand with growing retail ambitions and additional stores in New York’s SoHo shopping district as well as the Mayfair area of London. At the party, guests arrived via Waymo’s driverless fleet and walked through a series of installations, including floor-to-ceiling speaker walls, a mylar-wrapped dance floor and a metal-colored bounce house, as well as a claw machine stocked with Spinelli Kilcollin rings.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導Spinelli Kilcollin珠寶品牌在洛杉磯開設旗艦店的預覽派對，吸引了Jennie、Lizzo等名人出席，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Lady Gaga’s The Mayhem Ball Was One of the Biggest Pop Tours Ever: By the Numbers - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Gaga's year of Mayhem grossed more than $400 million on tour. According to figures reported to Billboard Boxscore, Gaga grossed $419.5 million and sold just under two million tickets in her year of *Mayhem*. Dating to 2009 with shows in American clubs, Gaga has grossed more than $1.1 billion and sold 8.4 million tickets over 555 reported shows. The Mayhem Ball is Gaga’s highest-grossing tour, by a long shot. Not only is The Mayhem Ball Gaga’s biggest, it’s among the highest-grossing treks of the 2020s. The Mayhem Ball was not quite a series of mini-residencies in the way of Styles’ upcoming tour – Gaga played one show apiece in Antwerp, Brisbane, and Netherlands – but her runs of nine non-consecutive shows at Madison Square Garden, eight at Kia Forum, and five at Paris’ Accor Arena called fans to travel to major cities in lieu of individual stops in every corner of the U.S. or Europe.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Lady Gaga的巡迴演唱會票房表現，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞是關於電影《Michael》的評論，該片由Jaafar Jackson飾演麥可·傑克森。

recentArticles.title: 'Michael' Review: Jaafar Jackson in Solid Michael Jackson Bio-Drama - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: ### Michael Jackson Biopic 'Michael': First Reactions](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/michael-jackson-biopic-first-reactions-1236570185/). Those and other signs of Jackson’s enduring popularity suggest that diehard fans of his music — some of us used to wait hours for “Billie Jean” to come around again on MTV — will still seize the opportunity to celebrate the legendary streak that took him from childhood Motown stardom to pop royalty, with the three certified banger albums produced by Quincy Jones, *Off the Wall*, *Thriller* and *Bad*. What makes all this compelling is the degree to which Jaafar Jackson, the son of Michael’s older brother Jermaine, disappears into the role of his celebrated uncle. Even more than a decade later, when Michael’s solo stardom had far eclipsed that of his work with his brothers — let alone his earning power — Joe remained a controlling bully, insisting that his most famous son continue touring with the Jacksons, as they became known when Jermaine left to pursue a solo career with Motown.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於麥可傑克森傳記電影的初步評價，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ review: Michael Jackson biopic is painfully bad - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ review: Michael Jackson biopic is painfully bad. How flabbergasting to see “Michael,” the new biopic about Michael Jackson, the best-selling solo artist of all time, crash and burn into such a cheap and embarrassing bore. Say what you will about Michael Jackson — and God knows there is plenty to say — he was not boring. In almost every moment of “Michael,” the King of Pop, played with panache and detail by his nephew Jaafar Jackson, is flashing a megawatt grin when he’s not staring longingly at his copy of “Peter Pan.” This Michael is perfect. That’s right — there is a scene in which Michael Jackson and Bubbles the chimp play Twister, underscored by “Blame It on the Boogie.”. In every sense, this is “Attorneys Present: The Michael Jackson Story.”. Jaafar Jackson plays his uncle Michael Jackson in "Michael." ©Lions Gate/Courtesy Everett Collection.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容關於麥可傑克森傳記電影《Michael》的負面評論，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: EXCLUSIVE: Complex Is Scaling Its Food Festival Family Style Into a Year-Round Media Brand - ADWEEK
recentArticles.snippet: ### Media News. # EXCLUSIVE: Complex Is Scaling Its Food Festival Family Style Into a Year-Round Media Brand. ## The streetwear brand is launching a slate of original programming for the brand while expanding its event footprint, projecting $20 million in revenue. Nearly two years after acquiring the food festival Family Style in May 2024, Complex is turning the brand into a full-fledged food media franchise. Now, the brand is extending into a year-round content operation, Complex chief executive Aaron Levant told ADWEEK. On Wednesday, the streetwear brand launched a dedicated YouTube channel for Family Style with four original series, an expansion that marks the most aggressive push into food from Complex since it was acquired by NTWRK in February 2024. Mark Stenberg is ADWEEK's senior media reporter. ## Media. #### YouTuber Jesser Launches Parent Company, Preps Business Expansion. The media company, which generates an eight-figure revenue, has content and product debuts coming later this year.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Complex媒體品牌將其美食節Family Style擴展為全年營運的媒體品牌，並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Taemin Is Ready to Make an Even Bigger Impact During Coachella Weekend Two - WWD
recentArticles.snippet: # Taemin Is Ready to Make an Even Bigger Impact During Coachella Weekend Two. The "Idol's Idol" is making history at the festival, bringing his most popular hits to the stage along with six new songs. Known as the “Idol’s Idol,” Taemin has established his legacy through strong stage performances and choreography, both as a solo artist and with second-generation K-pop group SHINee. This spring, he’s claimed a few “firsts” — he’s the first Korean solo male K-pop artist to be featured on the Coachella lineup, and the first to have a dedicated exhibition at the Grammy Museum. “ I want them to see the type of musician I am through the performances, the music and the way I’m expressing everything,” he says. “Justin Bieber performed on the same night that I did, and I really wanted to see his concert,” he says. “ As always, I think it’s gonna be very fun, as it always has been,” he says of performing with the group, which debuted in 2008.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要聚焦於K-pop藝人泰民在Coachella音樂節的歷史性演出及成就，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Postpones Marseille Concert In Face Of Potential French Government Ban - Deadline
recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West Postpones Marseille Concert In Face Of Potential French Government Ban. Kanye West has postponed a concert in the French port city of Marseille in June following news that France was studying options for banning the event due to his past antisemitic outbursts and pro-Nazi declarations. ### Kanye West: French Interior Minister Studying Options To Stop Marseille Concert](https://deadline.com/2026/04/kanye-west-french-interior-minister-ban-marseille-concert-1236860399/). ### Wireless Festival Canceled After Kanye West Blocked From Entering UK](https://deadline.com/2026/04/kanye-west-wireless-headline-controversy-antisemitic-remarks-1236783288/). West had been due to perform on June 11 at the Vélodrome stadium in Marseille, but news broke on Tuesday that French Interior Minister Laurent Nuñez was studying ways “all possibilities” to stop the concert. Back in the U.S., West’s first live performances in five years at the SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles in early April drew between 60,000 to 80,000 people a night and reportedly earned $33M between them, leaving music and concert organizer execs in a conundrum over how to move on next with the artist.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導Kanye West演唱會因爭議言論而延期，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Reveals Features On Self Titled Album - Majic 102.1
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Reveals Features On Self Titled Album. 'Kehlani' Features: Lil Wayne, Missy Elliot, Usher, Clipse & More. ## Share the post. ### Share this link via. ### Or copy link. Kehlani and Cardi B have collaborated on a new song for Kehlani’s upcoming album, with Cardi being one of the many features on the project. The collaboration was teased in a Spotify trailer featuring Kehlani enjoying a girls’ night with cocktails named after the album’s featured artists. This marks the latest collaboration between Kehlani and Cardi B, with Cardi expressing excitement for the album’s release on her Instagram Story. Kehlani’s self-titled album is set to be released on Friday.
